creator: serpent7776@gmail.com
text:
net/tigervnc-viewer/pkg-descr contains 
"This port provides client(viewer) compornents of TigerVNC",
but net/tigervnc-viewer package description contains
"This port provides server components of TigerVNC"

It looks like the description for package is incorrectly taken from master port's pkg-descr.

This is the case for both official packages and packages built in poudriere.

Oddly, freshports has the same issue: https://www.freshports.org/net/tigervnc-viewer/

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/net/tigervnc-viewer/pkg-descr?view=markup&pathrev=520683
https://freebsd.pkgs.org/11/freebsd-amd64/tigervnc-viewer-1.10.1_1.txz.html
